V-M-076.scope: Premium admin cockpit verification for operational density, inventories, MTProto analytics, confirmations, redaction, and deletion audit.

success-scenarios.scenario-1: Admin dashboard, users, devices, MTProto, plans, analytics, and servers remain scan-friendly on phone/tablet.
success-scenarios.scenario-2: Destructive and disruptive actions retain explicit confirmation and feedback.
success-scenarios.scenario-3: MTProto secrets, tags, full links, and high-risk identifiers stay redacted.

failure-scenarios.failure-1: Emergency controls are hidden by visual redesign or long lists become unusable.
failure-scenarios.failure-2: Any admin route exposes proxy secrets, raw tokens, or unredacted identifiers.
